name: smart-toll-management-dashboard-project
description: Smart Toll Management Dashboard System with Real-Time Events and Pricing Control

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix "Source Code/backend" && npm install --prefix "Source Code/frontend"
scripts.db:init: npm run prisma:migrate --prefix "Source Code/backend" && npm run prisma:seed --prefix "Source Code/backend"
scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
